entities.man: a tall man in a long coat

scenes.title: The Street Mural
scenes.background_prompt: A city alleyway with a large painted wall, trash bins to the side, a fire escape above, and cracked pavement. A vibrant, colorful street mural peek through: swirls of bright orange, a painted blue bird's wing on one side, green leaf patterns on the other. Afternoon light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A city alleyway in afternoon light. A tall man in a long dark gray overcoat and a black scarf stands in the center of the alley, facing the viewer with his hands in his pockets. He is positioned directly in front of a large wall, almost entirely blocking whatever is behind him. Only at the very edges — above his shoulders and beside his arms — fragments of a vibrant, colorful street mural peek through: swirls of bright orange, a painted blue bird's wing on one side, green leaf patterns on the other, suggesting a large and elaborate artwork hidden behind his figure. A few trash bins sit to the left of the alley. A metal fire escape zigzags up the building above. The cracked pavement has a few scattered puddles reflecting color from the mural's visible edges.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place man in the center of the alley, standing and facing the viewer with hands in pockets, positioned directly in front of the wall. He should almost entirely block whatever is behind him. Only at the very edges (above shoulders, beside arms), fragments of a vibrant colorful street mural should peek through.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom foreground, a ground made of irregular grey stone pavers features dark cracks where several small green clover-like plants grow. Moving from left to right across the bottom, there is a single white flower with a yellow center, a small green caterpillar crawling on a stone, a yellow flower, and another white flower. In the midground on the left, five brown cylindrical trash cans with lids are clustered together. In the center of the scene, a man stands facing forward with his hands tucked into the pockets of a long green coat. The man has a brown beard and mustache and wears a yellow knit beanie, a blue and brown plaid scarf, brown pants, and brown boots. To the right of the man stands a brown metal fire escape with a vertical ladder leading up to a small balcony with railings. A grey vertical pipe is attached to the wall on the far right. Behind the man, a large brick wall features a colorful mural. On the left side of the mural is a large blue wing, while the center contains swirling patterns of orange, yellow, and blue. On the right side of the mural is a large green plant with several pointed leaves. In the background above the wall, green rounded trees and bushes are visible under a bright blue sky with large, fluffy white clouds. On the far right, the upper portion of a brick building rises behind the fire escape.
